default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover of the Prophecy client account and content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Client Bottleneck:** Prophecy's inconsistent strategy has created a backlog of \~18 unreviewed articles, stalling the 5-article/week quota. Do not publish anything without Cody's explicit approval.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [**New Pipeline:** Use the "Article Agents Test Pipeline" for all new content. It's a test run, so you have full autonomy to edit its YAML code or request engineering changes to improve output.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Post-Processing:** All articles require a multi-step review (Atlas → Claude → Atlas) to enforce branding, fix formatting, and correct broken `prophecy.io` links.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Webflow Staging:** Stage articles as drafts in Webflow's "Guides" section for Cody's review. Do not publish; Cody handles the final step.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

## Topics

### Client Context & Bottleneck

  - [**Client:** Prophecy, an AI data prep/analysis company.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Strategy changes every few weeks, creating an unpredictable workload (e.g., a sudden focus on "Alteryx alternatives").](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Bottleneck:** \~18 articles are awaiting review from Cody (main contact), representing \~3.5 weeks of work.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [**Action:** Do not move any article from "Considering" to "In Production" without Cody's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This protects our team from client-side delays. If asked about the quota, cite the backlog as proof we've delivered.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)

### Content Workflow: Generation & Post-Processing

  - [**Generation:**](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [Use the "Article Agents Test Pipeline" for all new content.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [**Autonomy:** Edit the pipeline's YAML code or request engineering changes to improve output.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Fallback:** The old pipeline is available but requires heavy editing for its 5,000-word output.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Post-Processing (Multi-Tool Review):**](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [**1. Atlas:** Use Andrew's "post-processing process" prompts to enforce branding, revise sections, and format elements like intros, conclusions, and FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**2. Claude:** For client feedback, use the "Prophecy editorial section" tool to analyze comments. Then, manually verify all changes in the "Prophecy Claude" channel.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [**3. Atlas (Final Check):** Run the revised article through Atlas again.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
          - [**Compare to Artifacts:** Check against the "Test Run" audience personas and the writing guide.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
          - [**Regenerate Summaries:** Re-create the intro, conclusion, and TL;DR, as the content will have changed significantly.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Critical Fix:** All links must be updated from the old `prophecy.io` domain to the current `prophecy.ai` domain to prevent broken links.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### Publishing & Performance Tracking

  - [**Webflow Staging:**](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
      - [**Location:** Stage articles in Webflow's "Guides" section (not "Blog Posts").](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Process:** Create a draft, assign to "Prophecy Team," and set its status to "Client Review."](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [**Handoff:** Tag Cody and comment, "Created a draft on Webflow. Please finalize. Do not publish."](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [**Note:** Cody will review and publish the article himself.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking (Lucas Studio):**](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Task:** Weekly, add new article URLs to the "URL Cohorts" sections in Google Analytics 4 and Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [**Tool:** Use Claude to format the URLs correctly for each data source.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sucheta:**](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
      - [Conduct a test run with the new pipeline using a topic from the "Considering" list.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
      - [Meet with Andrew in \~3 hours (1:30 AM your time) to review the test run.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
      - [Process 25 Sunbit articles by Thursday for next week's queue.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [**Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [Send the Prophecy and Sunbit meeting recordings to Sucheta.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [Be available for questions for the next \~3 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/4cs2cyHQ59x1FQo8XrQ7AqPmjLndsQ9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

action_items.description: Post Prophecy channel comment tagging Carrie + Sucheta re: 18 articles in Considering; hold until Cody OK
Generate 1 test article in Article Agents Test Pipeline; do not send to Cody
Send 25 Sunbit articles to upline backend by Feb 19
Send Prophecy + Sunbit Fathom recordings to Sucheta
